title: Comprehensive v3 security audit — applied fixes
summary: 6-agent comprehensive audit covering 25 security areas. Applied fixes: 1 Critical (admin password gate was structurally unreachable — all GATED_ACTIONS handlers dead code after break in switch), 3 High (SQL INTERVAL injection, redirect-based SSRF in async-checks, share token IDOR allowing any team member to manage others tokens, bulk-scan rate limit applied once per request not per URL), 4 Medium (CSP img-src bare https: wildcard, protocol-relative URL bypass in notification links, AI endpoint URL exposed unauthenticated, per-request DDL + unbounded payload in ai/conversations), 2 Low (X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN vs DENY inconsistency, ProviderInfo.url leaked internal provider URL via response header). All fixes shipped; 0 TypeScript errors, 3831 tests passing.
